Internal Compliance Note — PDPA controls and Bursa LR context for Taman Raya Energy Berhad (Main Market issuer).
Purpose: record completed privacy controls for vendor onboarding and confirm absence of MNPI under CMSA and Bursa disclosure regime.
MNPI status: the financing mandate with Saujana Capital Bank Berhad and the acquisition of Lembah Utara Solar Sdn Bhd were announced via Bursa on 3 Apr 2026; this note contains no unpublished price-sensitive information.
DPA Schedule 1 with Awan Kinetik Sdn Bhd (HR SaaS) executed on 15 May 2026; fields limited to Staff ID, role, work email alias, department, payroll bank name (masked), and emergency contact category only (data minimisation applied).
Employee Onboarding Form (HRF-ONB/2026) labels updated: “Staff ID”, “Department”, “Work Email”, “NRIC (if legally required) — collect as masked e.g., XX-XXXX-XX-XXXX”, “Account No. (payroll) — masked 0000-XXXXXX-0”; placeholders are invalid and for format only.
Sensitive personal data (health, religious belief, biometric) is not collected by the HR SaaS; medical certificates remain on-prem per policy HR-RET-06.
Cross-border transfer: data-export approval DEX-TRB/2026-01 granted under PDPA s.129 for pseudonymised audit logs to Cloudhatch Pte Ltd (SG) via Awan Kinetik; encryption-at-rest and keys retained in MY, with onward-transfer contract controls.
Transfer Impact Assessment TIA/2026-04 completed; no NRIC, passport, or bank account numbers leave Malaysia; this approval supersedes DEX-TRB/2025-03 and requires no further consent.
DSAR and erasure handling: channel dpo@tamanrayaenergy.my monitored; DSAR-2026-014 was fulfilled and closed on 12 May 2026 with erasure of redundant CV attachments, and no items remain pending.
Consent withdrawal: revised HR privacy notice includes withdrawal mechanism; as at the date hereof, there are zero active withdrawal requests and no processing continues without a lawful basis.
Retention: HR profile data retained 7 years from termination; recruitment logs 24 months; automated deletion tested in UAT and promoted to PROD on 10 May 2026; no retention exceptions open.
Financing and deal files: lender KYC annexes contain only entity-level identifiers; no customer PII is shared with financiers or advisers, and no insider list entries remain active for the announced transactions.
Trading window: the company is in an open period; this memo is not an instruction to trade and does not alter insider status under CMSA s.188.
Queries: address to Legal & Compliance (role mailbox: compliance@tamanrayaenergy.my); for PDPA matters use dpo@tamanrayaenergy.my.
